name: Gifted: The Tombs
short_description: Gifted: The Tombs is a fantasy rogue-like with extraction elements. 1 player local, 1-4 players internet/LAN based multiplayer. Third person melee combat, collect items and gear on each floor to progress lower and lower.
detailed_description:
Gifted: The Tombs is a rogue-like dungeon crawler. Dive into the tombs solo or or in a group of up to four, over network play. You and your allies are to traverse as many floors down as you can, killing enemies, and gaining powerful equipment along the way. Combat is third person, over the shoulder, with melee, and ranged aspects. Collect armor, swords, gems, potions, and other fantasy items on each floor to gain power and continue further into the tombs. Find and equip magic books to gain abilities to aid you in your quest.

Set in the world of Gifted. Medieval civilizations struggle with the concept of some other mortals being favored by the gods. These favored people are Gifted. Their gifts would astound and amazing you. Warriors could lift a horse and hurl it into the air with ease, or a clairvoyant capable of telling you your deepest secrets. These individuals, their Gifts, and their motives could keep one up at night.

"You are not gifted. However with my magic, you could be - or at least strong enough that nobody would be the wiser. All I ask of you is to descend into the tombs below and acquire a simple artifact for me. Sounds easy enough?" - Unknown
